text.title: Product-Led Growth (PM Angle) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Product has self-serve surface AND buyer = user?

branch.question: Aha moment reachable in <= 10 min from signup?

conclusion.verdict: fix onboarding length first; do not apply PLG yet
define aha + write PQL + run activation experiments
